# Zensus

> AI-native cash flow forecasting and planning for startup founders.

Zensus helps founders with variable revenue know exactly when their cash runs out, and what to do about it. Connect QuickBooks, your bank account via Plaid, or HubSpot subscriptions. Get real-time cash flow projections and ask an AI agent questions about your business survival.

## Key Features

- Real-time cash flow projection with zero-cash date
- Agentic multi-turn scenario planning (text and voice)
- Subscription-intelligent revenue projections (annual, quarterly, monthly contracts)
- Direct integrations: QuickBooks, Plaid bank feeds, HubSpot
- Expense categorization across 8 business categories
- Weekly and daily cash flow drill-down
- CSV export at multiple granularities

## Company location

Zensus operates from **Austin, Texas, United States** (city-level; see site footer for a map of the Austin area).

## Target Audience

Founders and operators of startups with variable revenue, complex hiring plans, annual contracts, seasonal income, or usage-based pricing.

## Pricing

- Zensus Pro: $199/month, billed monthly, cancel anytime
